description: In Darwin Core, specimen parts are created using a self-join in the Material Entity class where materialEntityID = isPartOfMaterialEntityID. Therefore, all references to Specimen Part are equivalent to dwc:MaterialEntity where isPartOfMaterialEntityID is not null.
The Specimen Part type field is equivalent to dwc:MaterialEntityCategory.
The Specimen description field is equivalent to dwc:MaterialEntityRemarks.
The Mineral description field is equivalent to dwc:MaterialEntityRemarks.
